events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Must not include prose. The scenario: Roofing, commercial, ice barrier missing in cold climate, rough-complete, condition installed-defective. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision fail, risk high maybe critical? Missing ice barrier in cold climate = water intrusion risk, code non-compliance. Work stage rough-complete. percent_complete? Overall roofing roughed complete maybe 80. value irrelevant, leave 0. sound_source etc default empty/zero. findings: ice barrier underlayment absent at eaves/valleys/penetrations; exposed roof deck. actions: install approved self-adhered ice barrier per code and mfr specs; inspect prior to shingle installation. rationale: ice barrier required by IRC R905.2 in areas where there has been a history of ice dams (cold climates) etc. references: IRC R905.2, manufacturer specs. Need JSON only.

The observed roof assembly is roughed in but the ice barrier is entirely absent, creating a code non-compliance and elevated leak/ice-dam risk.", "references": ["IRC R905", "Manufacturer specifications for ice barrier underlayment"]}
